description_long: This object consists of a small, round wooden table with a rustic, hand-crafted appearance, featuring three thick, uneven legs and a textured tabletop with visible wood grain. Atop the table are three partially melted candles of varying heights and shapes, each with a creamy, off-white color and irregular, organic forms. The tallest candle is set in a simple, dark metal ring holder, while the other two are directly on the table surface, showing signs of use with visible wax drips and melted edges. The candles have stubby, exposed wicks but no visible flames. The overall look is medieval or fantasy-inspired, with a focus on natural materials and a slightly stylized, cartoonish finish. The table and candles together create a cozy, atmospheric decorative piece suitable for an urban setting such as a parklet, outdoor café, or themed public space.
description: A rustic round wooden table with three partially melted, off-white candles—one in a metal ring holder—showing wax drips and exposed wicks, evoking a cozy, medieval ambiance.
description_view_0: The table is seen from above with all three candles visible, highlighting the tallest candle in its metal holder and the wax drips on the tabletop.
description_view_1: The front view emphasizes the tallest candle in the metal ring holder, with the two smaller candles grouped to the left.
description_view_2: This angle shows the irregular shapes of the candles, with the tallest candle and its holder more to the right and the melted wax details more prominent.
description_view_3: The candles are viewed from the opposite side, with the tallest candle in the center and the two smaller, melted candles in front, showing more of the table's wood grain.
